hero.title: Your health companion
hero.subtitle: Hayyat helps you understand your body, screen for PCOS & Endometriosis, and walk into your doctor's office prepared — all in Gulf Arabic, on your phone.
hero.tagline: Hayyat — because you deserve to be heard
hero.chatWelcome: هلا 💛 قوليلي كيف حالك هالفترة؟ صوت أو كتابة — عادي، كلميني بالعربي.
hero.chatUser1: والله من زمان عندي ألم وقت الدورة بس أمي قالت عادي
hero.chatAi2: الألم اللي يوقف يومك مو شي لازم تتقبلينه. قوليلي أكثر؟
hero.chatUser2: وبشرتي صارت حبوب كثير وشعري يطيح
hero.chatAi3: سجّلت تغيرات البشرة وتساقط الشعر — خلينا نتأكد إن دكتورك يشوف الصورة كاملة.

understand.quoteEn: All girls are like this... it's normal.
understand.description: You've heard this from your mother, your aunt, maybe even your doctor. You bought painkillers every month. You thought the fatigue was just stress. What if someone told you it isn't normal — and helped you find out why?

conditions.label: WE CAN HELP
conditions.title: Struggling with symptoms
conditions.subtitle: You're not imagining it. Hayyat screens for the conditions behind your symptoms — conditions that take years to diagnose in the Gulf.

stats.stat1Text: Gulf women affected by PCOS — the highest rate in the world
stats.stat2Text: of women were told their pain is "just cramps" by family or a doctor
stats.stat3Text: the average time it takes to get an endometriosis diagnosis in the Arab world

conditions.botheredTitle: Not sure what's wrong, but you know
conditions.botheredText: That's exactly who Hayyat is for.

learnConditions.label: KNOWLEDGE IS POWER
learnConditions.title: Understanding your body starts here.
learnConditions.subtitle: Learn about the conditions we screen for, their symptoms, and what you need to know.

pcos.title: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS)
pcos.description: PCOS is a hormonal disorder affecting 1 in 5 women in the Gulf region. It occurs when the ovaries produce abnormal amounts of androgens (male hormones), leading to irregular periods, cysts on the ovaries, and various metabolic symptoms.
symptoms: Weight gain, especially around the abdomen
treatment: Birth control pills to regulate periods
whenToDoctor: Excessive hair growth or hair loss

endometriosis.title: Endometriosis
endometriosis.description: Endometriosis is a condition where tissue similar to the uterine lining grows outside the uterus. This tissue responds to hormonal changes during your menstrual cycle, causing pain, inflammation, and sometimes fertility issues. It takes an average of 11+ years to diagnose in the Arab world.
symptoms: Pain during bowel movements or urination
riskFactors: Starting periods at an early age
Heavy periods lasting more than 7 days
whenToDoctor: Heavy bleeding that soaks through pads

learnConditions.otherTitle: Other Conditions We Help Screen For

painful.title: Painful Periods (Dysmenorrhea)
painful.description: Severe menstrual cramps that interfere with daily activities. Often dismissed as "normal" but can indicate underlying conditions.

heavy.title: Heavy Menstrual Bleeding (Menorrhagia)
heavy.description: Excessive bleeding during periods that requires changing pads or tampons every 1-2 hours, or lasts longer than 7 days.

irregular.title: Irregular Menstrual Cycles
irregular.description: Unpredictable periods, cycles shorter than 21 days or longer than 35 days, or significant variation month to month.

hormonal.title: Hormonal Imbalances
hormonal.description: Disruptions in hormone levels causing acne, weight changes, mood swings, or excessive hair growth.

how.label: HOW IT WORKS
how.title: Three steps. One conversation.
how.step1Description: Open the app and just talk — voice or text, in Gulf Arabic. No forms. No English. No awkward clinic questions. Hayyat understands your dialect and gently guides the conversation.
how.step2Description: Hayyat uses published medical criteria — the same ones doctors use — to create a clear summary of your symptoms and risk level. One report for you in Arabic, one for your doctor in Arabic and English.
how.step3Description: Show your doctor a 2-page brief with everything they need. No more forgetting symptoms. No more being dismissed. After your visit, Hayyat helps you understand what the doctor said — in plain Arabic.
how.note: No downloads from the app store. Just open it on your phone.

care.label: YOUR CARE COMPANION
care.title: We stay with you — before,
care.subtitle: Most health apps stop at tracking. Hayyat walks with you through the whole journey.

preVisit.title: Pre-Visit Brief
preVisit.description: Your doctor gets a clear summary of your symptoms and history — so you don't have to repeat yourself or forget anything.

translator.title: Doctor Translator
translator.description: The doctor said "hyperandrogenism." Hayyat tells you: your body is making too many male hormones, and that's what's causing your symptoms.

medication.title: Medication Guide
medication.description: What each pill does, when to take it, what to expect. Ramadan-adjusted timing. A daily WhatsApp check-in: did you take it today?

stopCheck.title: If You Stop, We Ask Why
stopCheck.description: Stopped your meds? We don't just remind — we ask: nausea? cost? Ramadan fasting? Each answer gets a real solution, not another ping.

family.title: Family Messages
family.description: Need help explaining your condition to your family? Hayyat creates WhatsApp-ready messages — clear, simple, zero stigma.

missedAppointment.title: Missed Appointment?
missedAppointment.description: Life happens. We check in gently, figure out what got in the way, and help you reschedule when you're ready.

built.label: BUILT FOR YOU
built.title: For Gulf women. In Gulf Arabic.
built.titleLine2: Because your health experience should feel like home.

realArabic.title: 🗣️ Your Real Arabic
realArabic.description: Not formal Arabic. Not English-first. Hayyat speaks Gulf Arabic — Khaleeji, Najdi, Hejazi — the way you talk at home with your sisters.

ramadan.title: 🌙 Ramadan Aware
ramadan.description: Medication timing moves to Suhoor and Iftar. Symptoms are read in the context of fasting. Your health doesn't pause — and neither do we.

privacy.title: 🔒 Private. Always.
privacy.description: Photos deleted after processing. Voice deleted after transcription. Data stays in the Gulf, encrypted. You can erase everything in one tap. We'll never share your information.

stories.label: WOMEN LIKE YOU
stories.title: Don't just take our word for it.
stories.subtitle: Stories from the women who inspired Hayyat.

story1.quote: I spent 8 years thinking my pain was normal because my mother had the same pain. If someone had asked me the right questions — in Arabic — I would have known years earlier.
story1.name: Noura, 29

story2.quote: My patients visit 5 doctors before someone connects their symptoms. A pre-visit brief that shows the full picture? That would change everything for my clinic.
story2.name: Dr. Fatima

story3.quote: I stopped my medication because of the nausea but was too embarrassed to tell my doctor. If something had asked me why and given me a solution, I would have kept going.
story3.name: Sara, 34

finalCta.title: Ready to be heard?
finalCta.subtitle: حيّاة تسمعك
finalCta.description: We're launching our first pilot in Qatar. Join the waitlist to be among the first.
finalCta.note: Free. No credit card. We'll reach out when it's your turn.
